mapper.sql: q.id, q.task_type, q.chart_type, q.title, q.description, q.image_detail_description, q.prep_seconds, q.total_seconds, q.is_deleted, q.deleted_time, q.created_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO writing_question ( task_type, chart_type, title, description, image_detail_description, prep_seconds, total_seconds, is_deleted, deleted_time, created_time ) VALUES ( #{taskType}, #{chartType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{imageDetailDescription}, #{prepSeconds}, #{totalSeconds}, #{isDeleted}, #{deletedTime}, #{createdTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE writing_question SET task_type = #{taskType}, chart_type = #{chartType}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, image_detail_description = #{imageDetailDescription}, prep_seconds = #{prepSeconds}, total_seconds = #{totalSeconds} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM writing_question q WHERE q.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY q.created_time DESC, q.id DESC

SELECT
FROM writing_question q WHERE q.is_deleted = 0 AND REPLACE(UPPER(q.task_type), '_', '') = #{taskType} ORDER BY q.created_time DESC, q.id DESC

SELECT
FROM writing_question q WHERE q.id = #{id} AND q.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM writing_question q WHERE q.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE writing_question SET is_deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
